topics: Introduction to finance and financial engineering
Principal and interest - simple interest and compound interest - continuous compounding. Interest rate - risk free interest rates
term structure of interest rates and short rate models. Time value of money - investment and maturity period
present value of annuity and future value of annuity - calculations. Equated monthly instalment (EMI) - EMI calculation. Stocks - valuation of stocks and intrinsic value of stock
conventional and discounted cash flow methods - net present value (NPV) and internal rate of return (IRR) - Computation of NPV
equivalent maintenance cost and payback period. Cost of capital

Weighted average cost and weighted marginal cost - factors affecting. Company’s cost of capital and project cost of capital - cost of debt - cost of preference - cost of equity - capital asset pricing model (CAPM
Working capital and capital structure theories
Working capital - factors affecting capital requirements. Cash management - models of cash management
operating cycle and cash cycle calculations. Capital structure -net income approach
and Modigliani-Miller (MM) hypothesis. Trade off and signalling theory
